product_overview: NeuroForge is a single-user, AI-augmented cognitive enhancement app that combines habit tracking, deep-work tooling, and AI problem decomposition to help users build consistent focus and higher-leverage daily rituals. It surfaces measurable daily signals (NeuroScore, focus minutes, streaks) and guided interactions (Clarity, Reflection, Teach Back) to turn vague problems into prioritized action.
core_goals: Break down overwhelming problems into prioritized, actionable tasks
Support sustained deep work sessions and track resisted distractions
Track daily habits and surface progress with streaks and completion rates
Capture an evening reflection and produce concise AI-generated insights
Provide a single home dashboard that surfaces today's highest-leverage task and key metrics

features.name: Home Dashboard
features.description: A single-pane overview that greets the user, visualizes the NeuroScore and key stats, shows today's One Thing, and provides quick navigation to core modules.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See a dynamic time-of-day greeting -> Observe NeuroScore ring animation and current value -> Scan stat cards for Focus Minutes, Habits Done, Current Streak, and Clarity Score -> Read today's One Thing task -> Use a quick action to navigate to /focus

features.name: Clarity Engine
features.description: AI-assisted problem decomposition that transforms a user-described problem into prioritized tasks with step-level checkboxes and urgency/impact estimates.
user_flows: Navigate to /clarity -> Type a concise description of an overwhelming problem -> Submit the problem for decomposition -> View generated task cards labeled critical/high/medium/low with urgency and impact context -> Check off a completed step inside a task -> Request an immediate 'what to do right now' suggestion and receive a single next action

features.name: Focus Shield
features.description: A configurable deep-work session timer that tracks deep minutes, logs distractions, and offers an intervention flow when temptation strikes.
user_flows: Navigate to /focus -> Select a session duration (25, 45, or 60 minutes) -> Start a Deep Work session -> Watch the countdown timer run -> Complete the session and observe updated focus stats for deep minutes

Navigate to /focus -> Start a Deep Work session -> When tempted, trigger the intervention protocol -> Wait through the 60-second intervention countdown -> Choose to indicate 'I stayed strong' and observe the distraction resisted counter update

features.name: Habit Forge
features.description: A habit tracker built on the 4 Laws framework where users toggle daily completions, read habit design details, and track streaks and daily progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /habits -> View the list of habits loaded from the database -> Toggle a habit's completion for today -> Observe the progress bar update to reflect daily completion rate -> Open a habit to read its Cue, Craving, Response, and Reward details -> View the streak count for the habit

features.name: Evening Reflection
features.description: A nightly review where users score mood/productivity, answer three reflection prompts, and receive an AI-generated Truth Report summarizing insights.
user_flows: Navigate to /reflect -> Select a mood score between 1 and 10 -> Select a productivity score between 1 and 10 -> Fill in 'What went well' -> Fill in 'What distracted you' -> Fill in 'What will you change tomorrow' -> Submit the reflection -> Read the AI-generated Truth Report insight

features.name: Book Wisdom Library
features.description: A browsable library of condensed book principles and applications with an interactive Teach Back assessment to test understanding.
user_flows: Navigate to /wisdom -> Expand a book card to read its key principles and application suggestions -> Read an individual principle's explanation -> Request a Teach Back assessment and receive feedback to test comprehension

features.name: Rewire Challenges
features.description: Structured 7/14/21-day programs designed to rewire behavior with progress tracking and status filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /challenges -> Filter challenges by All, Available, Active, or Completed -> View challenge cards with difficulty badges and progress bars -> Start an available challenge -> Log today for an active challenge and observe the day's progress reflected in the challenge progress bar

routes.description: Home Dashboard with NeuroScore ring, stat cards, One Thing task, daily wisdom, and quick actions
AI-powered problem decomposition engine using Groq LLM
Deep work timer with distraction logging and I'm Tempted intervention
Habit tracker with 4 Laws of Behavior Change, streaks, and DB-backed completion toggle
Evening reflection with 3 questions, mood/productivity scales, and AI insight generation
Book wisdom library with expandable principles and Teach Back feature
Rewire challenges with 7/14/21-day programs and progress tracking

features.name: Home Dashboard
features.description: Central command center with dynamic time-of-day greeting, NeuroScore visualization, stat cards, and quick navigation
user_interactions: View the NeuroScore ring animation
See dynamic greeting based on time of day
View stat cards for Focus, Habits, Streak, and Clarity
See the One Thing task for today
Click quick action buttons to navigate to modules

features.name: Clarity Engine
features.description: AI-powered problem decomposition that breaks overwhelming problems into prioritized action paths
user_interactions: Type a problem description in the textarea
Click DECOMPOSE button to trigger AI analysis
View generated task cards with priority labels (critical/high/medium/low)
Check off completed steps within each task
Click WHAT SHOULD I DO RIGHT NOW button

features.name: Focus Shield
features.description: Deep work countdown timer with distraction tracking and emergency intervention protocol
user_interactions: Select session duration (25, 45, or 60 minutes)
Click Start Deep Work Session button
Watch the countdown timer
Click I'm Tempted button to trigger intervention overlay
Wait through 60-second countdown during intervention
Click I Stayed Strong or I Gave In buttons
View focus stats (deep minutes, distractions resisted)

features.name: Habit Forge
features.description: Habit tracking system based on Atomic Habits 4 Laws framework with database-backed completion and streaks
user_interactions: View list of habits loaded from database
Click checkbox to toggle habit completion (persisted to DB)
View progress bar showing daily completion rate
Click on a habit card to expand and see 4 Laws details (Cue, Craving, Response, Reward)
Click New Habit button
View streak count for each habit

features.name: Evening Reflection
features.description: Daily review ritual with 3 reflective questions, mood/productivity scoring, and AI-generated Truth Report
user_interactions: Click mood scale buttons (1-10)
Click productivity scale buttons (1-10)
Fill in What went well textarea
Fill in What distracted you textarea
Fill in What will you change tomorrow textarea
Click Complete Reflection button
View AI-generated Truth Report insight

features.name: Book Wisdom Library
features.description: Expandable book cards with key principles, applications, and Teach Back evaluation
user_interactions: Click on a book card to expand its principles
Read principle explanations and applications
Click Teach Back button to test understanding

features.name: Rewire Challenges
features.description: Structured 7/14/21-day challenge programs with progress tracking and status filters
user_interactions: Click filter buttons (All, Available, Active, Completed)
View challenge cards with difficulty badges and progress bars
Click Start Challenge button on available challenges
Click Log Today button on active challenges

known_limitations.issue: New Habit form is not yet implemented — the button opens no modal
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot create new habits from the UI yet

known_limitations.issue: AI features require a valid GROQ_API_KEY in .env
known_limitations.impact: Clarity Engine and Reflection will fail without the API key

known_limitations.issue: Challenges page uses hardcoded data, not connected to database
known_limitations.impact: Challenge progress is not persisted between page reloads

known_limitations.issue: Wisdom page uses hardcoded book data, not connected to database
known_limitations.impact: Book wisdom entries from the seeded DB are not used
